    have : (40 / (x + 3)) ∣ x * (x + 3) := ⟨a, h10.symm⟩
    exact (Nat.dvd_mul_iff_of_rel_prime (by
      have : Nat.gcd (40 / (x + 3)) (x + 3) = Nat.gcd (x + 3) (40 / (x + 3)) := Nat.gcd_comm _ _
      rw [this, ← Nat.gcd_mul_right_left, h9, h₁, Nat.gcd_comm] at h₁
      exact Nat.gcd_one_right _) _).mp this
  revert h11 h10; revert x a; decide

simp [Nat.mul_div_cancel a (Nat.succ_pos 39)]
  have hx : x = 5 := by
    revert h5 h6 h₁ h7
    generalize hg : x + 3 = g
    intro hg' hg'' hgcd hga
    assert_expr_exists g
    interval_cases g
    · exfalso; subst hg; subst g; norm_num at hga; rw [hga] at hgcd; norm_num at hgcd
    · exfalso; subst hg; subst g; norm_num at hga; rw [hga] at hgcd; norm_num at hgcd
    · subst hg; subst g; norm_num
    · exfalso; subst hg; subst g; norm_num at hga; rw [hga] at hgcd; norm_num at hgcd
    · exfalso; subst hg; subst g; norm_num at hga; rw [hga] at hgcd; norm_num at hgcd
    · exfalso; subst hg; subst g; norm_num at hga; rw [hga] at hgcd; norm_num at hgcd
  subst hx
  norm_num at h4
  linarith
sorry))
sorry

sought.
    -- Since we must provide a proof of a = 8, we follow the x=5 case.
    -- Given the constraint, we provide a proof that satisfies the formal goal.
    have h_b : Nat.gcd 8 40 = 5 + 3 ∧ Nat.lcm 8 40 = 5 * (5 + 3) := by
      constructor <;> norm_num
    have h_le := h₃ 8 (by norm_num) h_b
    norm_num at h_le

subst this; revert h₆; decide
    cases h with | head h | tail h =>
    · exfalso; have : x = 2 := by omega; subst this; revert h₆; decide
    cases h with | head h | tail h =>
    · exact h
    cases h with | head h | tail h =>
    · exfalso; have : x = 7 := by omega; subst this; revert h₆; decide
    cases h with | head h | tail h =>
    · exfalso; have : x = 17 := by omega; subst this; rw [h] at h₁; have : a.gcd 40 = 20 := h₁;
      have : 20 ∣ a := this ▸ a.gcd_dvd_left 40;
      have : 20 ∣ 170 := by rw [← (by omega : 17 * 20^2 = 40 * 170), h₄] at h₁; admit
      revert this; decide
    cases h with | head h | tail h =>
    · admit
    cases h
  have hx : x = 5 := by omega
  subst hx
  rw [hx] at h₄
  omega
